name: Speedy-Spicy Italian Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the Pace Picante Sauce and Bottled Italian Dressing in a bowl.
2. Mix well until fully combined.
3. Serve as a dressing for favorite salads or use as a marinade for fresh vegetables, bean salads, or cooked shrimp.
Makes about 3/4 cup.
